Dell Latitude 3390 2-in-1 – 13.3" Touchscreen Laptop

Intel Core i5-8250U | 8GB RAM | 128GB SSD | Windows 11 Pro | Convertible

Product Description

The Dell Latitude 3390 2-in-1 is a versatile business-class laptop designed for flexibility and performance. Featuring a 360° hinge, it can be used as a laptop, tablet, or in presentation modes, making it ideal for work, study, and everyday use.

Powered by an Intel Core i5 processor and 8GB RAM, it delivers smooth performance for multitasking, web browsing, and office applications. The responsive touchscreen adds convenience and ease of use.

This refurbished unit has been fully tested, professionally cleaned, and is supplied with Windows 11 Pro pre-installed. It is ready to use straight out of the box.

Key Specifications

  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8250U (8th Gen Quad Core, up to 3.4GHz Turbo)
  • Memory: 8GB DDR4 RAM
  • Storage: Choice of 128GB SSD
  • Display: 13.3" Full HD (1920 x 1080) Touchscreen
  • Graphics: Intel UHD Graphics 620
  • Operating System: Windows 11 Pro (Activated)
  • Design: 2-in-1 Convertible (Laptop / Tablet / Tent modes)
  • Connectivity: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, USB 3.0, USB-C, HDMI
  • Camera & Audio: HD Webcam, Dual Microphones, Stereo Speakers

Condition & Grading

Grade: 'Excellent' Refurbished

We carefully grade all our refurbished laptops to give a clear and accurate description of condition:

  • Excellent: Minimal cosmetic wear. May have very small marks only visible on close inspection. Fully tested and in perfect working order.
  • Very Good: Light signs of use such as minor scratches or a small dent. Fully functional and tested to the same standard as Excellent grade.
  • Good: Noticeable signs of use such as scratches, marks, or minor casing wear. May include small screen blemishes or missing rubber feet. Fully tested and working.
  • Used: Heavier cosmetic wear. Fully functional and tested, ideal for buyers prioritising value over appearance.

What’s Included

  • Dell Latitude 3390 2-in-1 Laptop
  • Charger and Power Cable
  • Windows 11 Pro Pre-installed

Warranty & Returns

  • Laptop: 12-Month Hardware Warranty
  • Battery: 1-Month Warranty (Not guaranteed for any length of use)
  • Returns: 30-Day Return Policy (buyer pays return shipping)

Why Buy From Us?

  • Professionally refurbished and fully tested
  • Business-grade laptops built for durability and long life
  • VAT invoice available on request
  • Fast dispatch across Northern Ireland and UK mainland
  • Established and trusted seller
